name: ExtensionManufacturedItemDefinition_Property
title: R5: General characteristics of this item (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ManufacturedItemDefinition.property` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ManufacturedItemDefinition.property` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ManufacturedItemDefinition.property` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ManufacturedItemDefinition.property` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ManufacturedItemDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `ManufacturedItemDefinition.property` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
